creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun May  3 16:03:31 UTC 2020
New revision: 533791
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/533791

Log:
  www/squid-devel: resurrect and upgrade to 5.0.2

  - it is strongly recommended to review release notes
    http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v5/squid-5.0.2-RELEASENOTES.html
    if you decide to upgrade
  - The most notable change for maintainer was BDB deprecation in behalf of TDB
  - Know upstream issues:
    https://bugs.squid-cache.org/show_bug.cgi?id=5042

  PR:		246140
  Submitted by:	Pavel Timofeev <timp87@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/MOVED
  head/www/Makefile
  head/www/squid-devel/

  head/www/squid-devel/distinfo
  head/www/squid-devel/files/patch-configure

  head/www/squid-devel/files/patch-src_enums.h
  head/www/squid-devel/pkg-plist
